changes: runs/manager/data_ledger.json:1 — added canonical embedded-schema ledger with 25 evidence-backed asset rows, lineage, rights, partitions, consumers, dispositions, owners, and checks.
runs/manager/DATA_LEDGER.md:1 — added deterministic generated view with the required GENERATED/do-not-hand-edit header.

tests/racketsport/test_audit_data_utilization.py:60 — added round-trip, seven failure-mode, NEVER-QUEUED, snapshot, and direct-CLI tests.

full_suite.failure_notes: 18 existing court-fixture drift failures: test_compare_img1605_partial_labels_rejects_current_bad_proposal; 12 test_court_finding_technology_benchmark selector/temporal tests; test_build_report_includes_img1605_partial_visible_gate; test_img1605_progress_builds_partial_visible_label_payload; both test_court_partial_geometry tests; and test_lm_homography_report_scores_reviewed_full_labels_without_claiming_verified. Current fixtures expose 15 vs 14 keypoints, 3 vs 1 temporal frames, or 6 vs 5 samples. Eight sandbox socket failures: all three test_court_keypoint_review_server tests, all three test_review_input_server tests, and two test_sam3dbody_persistent_worker tests fail binding local TCP/Unix sockets with PermissionError. Remaining failures: test_public_eval_persists_probability_maxima_and_nonfinite_count raises StopIteration for a parameterless diagnostic model; test_generate_corpus_is_deterministic_and_fast_for_small_cpu_sample took 9.43s versus <5s; test_real_scaffold_tool_index_matches_checked_in_schema finds 3 unrelated unknown CLIs; test_train_court_model_v2_cli_cpu_smoke_beats_random_init exceeded 540s; and two test_truthful_capabilities storage tests find 6 unknown large tracked artifacts. None involve the four lane-owned files, but they were not proven to fail on a clean HEAD baseline, so failures_all_preexisting is false.

honest_issues: The required wide suite is not green, so global PASS is not supportable.
The storage-policy audit is red: 78 missing allowlisted untracked files, 6 unknown large tracked files, and 1 unknown large untracked file, all outside this lane's file fence.
M=0 means every older payload has an explicit consumer/blocker/quarantine/rejection/defer ruling; it does not mean every asset was productively used.

The ledger still records substantive data blockers: the pb.vision teacher corpus has 0 locally decodable windows, several overlap checks are PARTIAL or NOT_RUN, and the 3,026-row BALL contamination finding remains UNRULED.
No separate runs/lanes/data_steward_ledger_20260721 report was written because the exclusive ownership rule explicitly allowed only the four named files.
next: Resolve the unrelated wide-suite and storage-policy drift in their owning lanes, then rerun the same full command; meanwhile GPU lane specs can consume this ledger and audit CLI as their pre-dispatch gate.
